subcodes.first_line: O thou who art wronged! That which was written hath been perused. Its contents brought spirit and sweet fragrance, and evoked grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلوم آنچه مرقوم شد ملاحظه گردید مضامین مورث روح و ریحان گردید و موجب لطف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
